mapper.select: SELECT id, operator_name, country, region, network_type, data_month, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info ORDER BY id
SELECT id, operator_name, country, region, network_type, data_month, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info WHERE country = #{country} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, operator_name, country, region, network_type, data_month, created_time, updated_time FROM operator_info WHERE operator_name = #{operatorName} ORDER BY id

SELECT s.id, s.operator_id, s.data_month, s.lte_700M_site, s.lte_700M_cell, s.lte_800M_site, s.lte_800M_cell, s.lte_900M_site, s.lte_900M_cell, s.lte_1400M_site, s.lte_1400M_cell, s.lte_1800M_site, s.lte_1800M_cell, s.lte_2100M_site, s.lte_2100M_cell, s.lte_2600M_site, s.lte_2600M_cell, s.nr_700M_site, s.nr_700M_cell, s.nr_800M_site, s.nr_800M_cell, s.nr_900M_site, s.nr_900M_cell, s.nr_1400M_site, s.nr_1400M_cell, s.nr_1800M_site, s.nr_1800M_cell, s.nr_2100M_site, s.nr_2100M_cell, s.nr_2600M_site, s.nr_2600M_cell, s.nr_3500M_site, s.nr_3500M_cell, s.nr_4900M_site, s.nr_4900M_cell, s.lte_total_site, s.lte_total_cell, s.nr_total_site, s.nr_total_cell, s.created_time, s.updated_time FROM site_info s ORDER BY s.operator_id, s.data_month

SELECT s.id, s.operator_id, s.data_month, s.lte_700M_site, s.lte_700M_cell, s.lte_800M_site, s.lte_800M_cell, s.lte_900M_site, s.lte_900M_cell, s.lte_1400M_site, s.lte_1400M_cell, s.lte_1800M_site, s.lte_1800M_cell, s.lte_2100M_site, s.lte_2100M_cell, s.lte_2600M_site, s.lte_2600M_cell, s.nr_700M_site, s.nr_700M_cell, s.nr_800M_site, s.nr_800M_cell, s.nr_900M_site, s.nr_900M_cell, s.nr_1400M_site, s.nr_1400M_cell, s.nr_1800M_site, s.nr_1800M_cell, s.nr_2100M_site, s.nr_2100M_cell, s.nr_2600M_site, s.nr_2600M_cell, s.nr_3500M_site, s.nr_3500M_cell, s.nr_4900M_site, s.nr_4900M_cell, s.lte_total_site, s.lte_total_cell, s.nr_total_site, s.nr_total_cell, s.created_time, s.updated_time FROM site_info s WHERE s.operator_id = #{operatorId} ORDER BY s.data_month

SELECT s.id, s.operator_id, s.data_month, s.lte_700M_site, s.lte_700M_cell, s.lte_800M_site, s.lte_800M_cell, s.lte_900M_site, s.lte_900M_cell, s.lte_1400M_site, s.lte_1400M_cell, s.lte_1800M_site, s.lte_1800M_cell, s.lte_2100M_site, s.lte_2100M_cell, s.lte_2600M_site, s.lte_2600M_cell, s.nr_700M_site, s.nr_700M_cell, s.nr_800M_site, s.nr_800M_cell, s.nr_900M_site, s.nr_900M_cell, s.nr_1400M_site, s.nr_1400M_cell, s.nr_1800M_site, s.nr_1800M_cell, s.nr_2100M_site, s.nr_2100M_cell, s.nr_2600M_site, s.nr_2600M_cell, s.nr_3500M_site, s.nr_3500M_cell, s.nr_4900M_site, s.nr_4900M_cell, s.lte_total_site, s.lte_total_cell, s.nr_total_site, s.nr_total_cell, s.created_time, s.updated_time FROM site_info s WHERE s.operator_id = #{operatorId} AND s.data_month = #{dataMonth}
SELECT DISTINCT data_month FROM site_info ORDER BY data_month DESC
